positioning.gender_coding_note: Not gender-neutral. Supersedes any prior gender-inclusive-language default for umbrella/sub-brand identity work.
positioning.risk: Can read as too feminine if overused as decoration
positioning.risk_mitigation: Use feminine traits as vocabulary, not the word 'feminine' itself

voice_pillars.name: Receptivity
voice_pillars.description: Taking in a person or situation fully before rushing to fix it

voice_pillars.name: Intuitive pattern-sensing
voice_pillars.description: Reading what's true before the data catches up

voice_pillars.name: Cyclical thinking
voice_pillars.description: Building in seasons, not just sprints

voice_pillars.name: Relational intelligence
voice_pillars.description: Weighing how a decision lands on people, not only whether it's correct

voice_pillars.name: Embodiment
voice_pillars.description: Trusting the body as a source of information, not an afterthought to the mind

voice_pillars.name: Softness held with edge
voice_pillars.description: Gentle and unshakeable in the same sentence

cotton_candy_revolt.rationale: Candy color with teeth. No sage; this brand isn't about calm wisdom.
cotton_candy_revolt.accent_mark_usage: hover states on cards and CTAs
cotton_candy_revolt.voice_line: Sweet on the surface, talking back underneath.

the_frequency_blueprint.rationale: Leads with growth and warmth. Orchid only as a spark for 'frequency.'
the_frequency_blueprint.accent_mark_usage: none yet; uses primary mark only
the_frequency_blueprint.voice_line: A practice for people who already feel the pull to evolve.

zensual_mastery.rationale: Intimacy-led. Dark reads as sophistication, not severity.
zensual_mastery.headline_font_note: carried over from earlier brand work, kept intentionally
zensual_mastery.voice_line: Intimacy, held with sophistication rather than softness alone.

pole_class_pro.rationale: Strength and visible movement. Minimal sage; this is power, not calm.
pole_class_pro.accent_mark_usage: none yet; uses primary mark only
pole_class_pro.voice_line: Strength and visible movement, no apology for either.

web_development_and_design.voice_line: The most B2B-credible room in the house, still unmistakably the same house.

master.secondary_font_substitute_source: Fontshare, free, ITF Free Font License

body_font_system_wide.license: ITF Free Font License, free for commercial use

typography.rule: No two brands share a headline font. Body copy is Switzer everywhere, no exceptions.

logo_lockup_formula.structure: [key word, brand's own headline font] / [remaining word(s), tracked uppercase Switzer]

icon_system.design_principle: No full butterfly icon anywhere. Abstraction only, drawn from where the green-dappled scales meet the black-ringed pink.

primary_mark.name: eye_mark
primary_mark.structure: three concentric rings: faint outer boundary, dotted forest-shade ring (36s rotation), veiled-rose ring, electric-orchid pulsing core

scatter_to_solid.usage: hover states on cards and CTAs

icon_system.accessibility: all marks must respect prefers-reduced-motion, dropping to static with no animation

wing_reveal.method: SVG mask, two abstract wing shapes unfold
wing_reveal.use_case: launch pages, major reveals only, never routine nav

vein_transition.method: SVG morph + GSAP, pages split like wing veins

open_items: Prime Serif and Söhne not yet licensed; Fraunces and Switzer are working substitutes
The Frequency Blueprint and Pole Class Pro have no bespoke accent mark yet
Vector logo lockup files not yet produced
Photography/imagery direction undecided; defaulting to abstraction-only
Accessibility/contrast pass needed on real layouts, especially electric_orchid on gunpowder and body text on veiled_rose
The Frequency Store no longer exists as a standalone brand; folded under The Frequency Blueprint
